holdings.infoBox: EFAD is an equity ETF with a total of 76 individual holdings. The top holdings are Murata Manufacturing stock at 2.26%, Lasertec at 1.88%, ASML Holding at 1.72%, Pro Medicus at 1.68%, and Fisher & Paykel Healthcare Corporation at 1.49%.

overview.description: The ProShares MSCI EAFE Dividend Growers ETF (EFAD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE Dividend Masters index. The fund tracks an equally weighted broad-market index of developed-market companies, ex-North America, that have raised their dividend for each of the past 10 years. EFAD was launched on Aug 19, 2014 and is issued by ProShares.
